flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at ICPR Junior College fell 26% between 2006 and 2009 (25.7% → 18.9%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at ICPR Junior College rose 21% between 2021 and 2024 ($7.2k → $8.7k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at ICPR Junior College rose 21% between 2021 and 2024 ($7.2k → $8.7k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at ICPR Junior College rose 50% between 2006 and 2009 (401 → 602).
